title: Lunchbox's Vanilla+ Modpack
description: Vanilla+ Modpack designed to enhance the experience of normal vanilla minecraft and bring out the immersive feel the game is missing.
body:
Lunchbox's Vanilla+ Modpack aims to provide a more immersive experience in minecraft while also allowing slower pc's to have a smooth and fun experience. By adding smaller more mechanic oriented mods like 3d skins and the Fresh Animations Resource Pack minecraft can be very satisfying to experience, and with performance mods like sodium and lithium in combination with Iris even slower Pc's can play with shaders without giving up those beloved Frames per Second.

With these mods we have added a more advanced terrain generation with Terralith and Tectonic allowing insane mountains and deep and windy caves. Overhauled villages and Better End and Nether these realms will not be the same. With new world generation and advanced structure overhauls there is always something new to explore.
